pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 'threat-intel-blocklist'.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify rule ID 100100.
Extracted directly from the task description which explicitly lists all 8 IPs and their categories.
Task description explicitly requires the rule description to include 'threat intelligence', which is also enforced in verifier.py.
Task description explicitly requires the rule group to include 'threat_intelligence', which is also enforced in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to create a Wazuh CDB list and custom rule using exact strings explicitly defined in the task description. The list must be named 'threat-intel-blocklist' and contain exactly 8 specific IP/category pairs (e.g., '45.33.32.156:network_scanner', '185.220.101.34:tor_exit_node'). The rule must be configured with ID 100100, contain 'threat intelligence' in its description, and include 'threat_intelligence' in its groups.
